creator: jkb@best.com
text:
The "FILES" section of ipfstat(8) man page refers to "/vmunix":

	FILES
       /dev/kmem
       /dev/ipl
       /dev/ipstate
       /vmunix

	Also in "DESCRIPTION": The kernel name defaults to /vmunix

Fix: coredump# diff -u ipfstat.8.old ipfstat.8
How-To-Repeat: 
	man ipfstat
